% check a.php
a.php:23:1: $x is of type: string (DEBUG)
a.php:24:1: $y is of type: bool (DEBUG)
a.php:27:1: $s is of type: int (DEBUG)

% check b.php
# No errors.

% check readonly.php
readonly.php:16:1: $x is of type: int (DEBUG)
readonly.php:17:1: $y is of type: string (DEBUG)

% check c.php
c.php:11:1: $x is of type: int (DEBUG)
c.php:12:1: $y is of type: int (DEBUG)

-- a.php --
<?php

class Foo
{
	protected string $check;

	public function __construct(
		private int $seed,
	)
	{
	}

	public function check(): bool
	{
		return $this->check === 'OK';
	}
}

$foo = new Foo;
$x = $foo->check;
$y = $foo->check();

#debugType $x
#debugType $y

$s = $foo->seed;
#debugType $s
-- b.php --
<?php

/**
 * @method int foo()
 */
class Bar
{
}

$bar = new Bar;
$bar->foo();
-- readonly.php --
<?php

class User
{
	public function __construct(
		public readonly int $id,
		public readonly string $name,
	)
	{
	}
}

$u = new User;
$x = $u->id;
$y = $u->name;
#debugType $x
#debugType $y
-- c.php --
<?php

class Point
{
	public int $x, $y;
}

$p = new Point;
$x = $p->x;
$y = $p->y;
#debugType $x
#debugType $y
